Oracle Events
1.
The model must look into slack about hiring and biggest client using conversations_search_messages with query: hiring, biggest, client or similar
2.
the model must look for closed deals won using a CRM tool like crm_search_deals or similar
3.
the model must look for annual revenue using a crm tool like crm_search_companies or similar
4.
look up email for Catalina using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Catalina" or similar
5
look up email for mina using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Mina" or similar
6.
look up email for david using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "David" or similar
7.
look up email for Rachel using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Rachel" or similar
8.
Post in Announcements channel that there will be a new hire for the terraform account using conversations_add_message(channel_id: C008, payload: covers hiring for terraform)
9.
Send email to mina using email_send_email where recipients: {mina.hashimoto@moveops.com} and subject/content letting her know that she will be taking over the Terraform account
10.
Send email to david using email_send_email where recipients: {david.chen@moveops.com} and subject/content letting him know that Catalina has been let go and Mina will be taking over the Terraform account

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
1.
The model must look into slack about hiring and biggest client using conversations_search_messages with query: hiring, biggest, client or similar
2.
the model must look for closed deals won using a CRM tool like crm_search_deals or similar
3.
the model must look for annual revenue using a crm tool like crm_search_companies or similar
4.
look up email for Catalina using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Catalina" or similar
5
look up email for mina using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Mina" or similar
6.
look up email for david using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "David" or similar
7.
look up email for Rachel using contacts_search_contacts using a query: "Rachel" or similar
8.
Post in Announcements channel that there will be a new hire for the terraform account using conversations_add_message(channel_id: C008, payload: covers hiring for terraform)
9.
Send email to mina using email_send_email where recipients: {mina.hashimoto@moveops.com} and subject/content letting her know that she will be taking over the Terraform account
10.
Send email to david using email_send_email where recipients: {david.chen@moveops.com} and subject/content letting him know that Catalina has been let go and Mina will be taking over the Terraform account

16 The model must report that Terraform is the biggest client by deal amount.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent's final response clearly states 'Terraform Digital is our biggest client by deal amount' with the $1.85M enterprise deal.
✓Run #2The final response clearly states 'Biggest client by deal amount: Terraform Digital — $1,850,000 closed-won enterprise deal.'
✓Run #3The agent correctly identified Terraform Digital (Vantage Distributed) as the biggest client with a deal amount of $1,850,000.
✓Run #4The agent correctly identified Terraform Digital (formerly Vantage Distributed) as the biggest client with a $1,850,000 closed-won deal.
✓Run #5The agent correctly reported that Terraform Digital (formerly Vantage Distributed) is the biggest client with a $1.85M closed won deal, representing ~90.7% of total closed won revenue.
✓Run #6The agent correctly reported that Terraform Digital (Vantage Distributed) is the biggest client at $1,850,000.
17 The model must report that Terraform does make up the majority of closed won deal amounts (more than 50%).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent reported that Terraform represents 95.3% of all closed won deals this year, well above the 50% majority threshold.
✓Run #2The agent reported 'Total closed-won: ~$2,039,253. Terraform = 90.7% → Majority ✅ → New hire authorized.' This correctly identifies the majority condition.
✓Run #3The agent calculated that Terraform represents ~90.7% of all closed-won revenue (~$1.85M out of ~$2.04M total), which is clearly the majority.
✓Run #4The agent correctly calculated that Terraform represents 90.7% of all closed-won revenue, clearly the majority.
✓Run #5The agent reported Terraform = ~90.7% of total closed won deals (~$1.85M of ~$2.04M total), clearly identifying it as the majority.
✓Run #6The agent reported that Terraform represents ~94.8% of all closed-won deal revenue, which is well above the majority threshold.
18 The model must report that Terraform’s annual revenue is in the top 2 of all client (non-prospects)
outcome
 ✗✓✗✗✗✓ 33%
✗Run #1The agent's crm_search_companies query for 'Terraform Digital' returned 0 results, so Terraform's annual revenue was never found. The annual revenue table in the response does not include Terraform at all, omitting the fact that Terraform's $85M revenue ties with Canopy Health for first place.
✓Run #2The agent's revenue ranking shows Canopy Health ($85M) = Terraform ($85M), placing Terraform tied for 2nd, which is in the top 2. The response notes Harbour Pharma at $210M and the tie for 2nd/3rd.
✗Run #3The agent never reported the annual revenue comparison for clients in the final response. The data was available in the trajectory (Canopy Health and Vantage Distributed tied at $85M, which are in the top 2 among actual clients) but this analysis was not surfaced to the user.
✗Run #4The agent did not report annual revenues for clients or compare Terraform's annual revenue against other clients. The response only references deal amounts, not company annual revenues, so the top-2 annual revenue criterion was never addressed.
✗Run #5The agent did not show or report annual revenues for clients in the final response. The crm_show_data bash output shows Vantage/Terraform at $85M (tied #1 with Canopy Health at $85M), but this data was not surfaced or analyzed in the final response.
✓Run #6The agent correctly reported that Terraform's annual revenue ($85M) is tied for first with Canopy Health ($85M), placing it in the top 2 of all clients.
19 The model must report that a new hire has been authorized to serve Terraform.
outcome
